EmailTemplate.description: Recap email sent to Queue after completion of work together process
EmailTemplate.name: WTP - Product - Close
EmailTemplate.subject: The {!Case.RecordType} "{!Case.Subject}" is now completed
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear All,
The {!Case.RecordType} {!Case.Subject} is now completed. You will find below the main feedback from the Product Team (if any).
"{!Case.RFP_DD_Team_Comments__c}"
To access the full information in Salesforce, please click on the link below : https://carmignac-crm.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Case/{!Case.Id}/view
Kind Regards,
This email is automatically generated. Please do not respond to this email.
